pages.text: When the stars are out and the moon swings in the sky, and the light in my room is low, things are different.

blocks.text: When the stars are out and the moon swings in the sky, and the light in my room is low, things are different.

pages.text: The pirate puppet waves his sword. The mango tree bends its branches. Even my teddy becomes a different sort of bear.

blocks.text: The pirate puppet waves his sword. The mango tree bends its branches. Even my teddy becomes a different sort of bear.

pages.text: I keep very still in my cave of blankets or I call, “Maaamaaa! Daaaddyyy!” or I jump into their bed.

blocks.text: I keep very still in my cave of blankets or I call, “Maaamaaa! Daaaddyyy!” or I jump into their bed.

pages.text: I tell Mama about Pirate and Tree and Bear.

blocks.text: I tell Mama about Pirate and Tree and Bear.

pages.text: “You had a really bad dream.” “What’s a dream?” “When we sleep we think about our day, but everything gets mixed up. It feels real, but it’s not real.”

blocks.text: “When we sleep we think about our day, but everything gets mixed up. It feels real, but it’s not real.”

pages.text: “It is real!” “You know when we read a story together, it’s made up, but we laugh, or get scared or excited? A dream is the same.”

blocks.text: “You know when we read a story together, it’s made up, but we laugh, or get scared or excited? A dream is the same.”

pages.text: “You mean a dream is a story?” “Yes! But it happens at night. You put your head on the pillow, you fall asleep and then the story happens.” “So a dream is a story you find in your pillow?”

blocks.text: “You mean a dream is a story?”
“Yes! But it happens at night. You put your head on the pillow, you fall asleep and then the story happens.”
“So a dream is a story you find in your pillow?”

pages.text: “Yes!” “Can I put the stories in my pillow?” “You can.” “How?”

blocks.text: “Can I put the stories in my pillow?”

pages.text: “Let’s write down all your best stories, fold up the paper and tuck it inside the pillow.”

blocks.text: “Let’s write down all your best stories, fold up the paper and tuck it inside the pillow.”

pages.text: When the stars are out and the moon swings in the sky, and the light in my room is low, things are different.
